name: @tootallnate/phyre
description: Parser for Sony PhyreEngine's self-describing binary container format (magic 'RYHP'). Used by FFX/X-2 HD Remaster, FFXII The Zodiac Age, and other Sony-middleware titles on PS3/PS4/Vita/Switch. Walks the embedded class namespace to extract texture metadata (PTexture2D) + raw pixel payloads, with built-in conversion to standard DDS for use in Photoshop / Noesis / etc.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
